title: Rubinium reforged
description: Adds new minerals (such as ruby ​​and sapphire) by reworking the mechanics of processing old minerals, and adds decorations
body:
the mod adds two new materials, namely ruby and sapphire, also slightly reworking the mechanics of diamond and emerald mining, making them more interesting and longer, the mod adds jewelry that gives effects And debuffs, rings and necklaces The mod plans to evolve and add new content in each update!

**Subscribe!**
